metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins by ben3329

plugins.name: staged-review
plugins.description: Iterative code review loop for git staged changes using 5 specialized parallel review agents. Reviews, fixes, and repeats until clean.

plugins.name: skill-review
plugins.description: Iterative skill review loop using 4 specialized parallel review agents. Reviews discoverability, structure, clarity, and best practices, then fixes and repeats until clean.
